message:
test(color-types): expand from 88 to 101 tests for sRGBA/LinearRGBA color types (wa-35chb)

Add 13 new tests covering premultiply/demultiply roundtrip, Copy/Clone
semantics, alpha preservation through sRGB↔linear conversions,
interpolation at quarter point, HashSet deduplication, and pixel
boundary values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
